articles.title: CNY: PBoC on hold as Yuan firms – BNY
articles.snippet: BNY’s Head of Markets Macro Strategy Bob Savage notes that the People’s Bank of China kept its 1-year and 5-year LPR unchanged at 3% and 3.5%, balancing growth support and currency stability. Despite weak GDP and persistent deflationary pressures, authorities are focusing on services consumption.

articles.title: Want $1 Million in Retirement? Invest $100,000 in These 3 Stocks and Wait a Decade.

combined_text:
[0.33] CNY: PBoC on hold as Yuan firms – BNY
BNY’s Head of Markets Macro Strategy Bob Savage notes that the People’s Bank of China kept its 1-year and 5-year LPR unchanged at 3% and 3.5%, balancing growth support and currency stability. Despite weak GDP and persistent deflationary pressures, authorities are focusing on services consumption.

[0.33] Want $1 Million in Retirement? Invest $100,000 in These 3 Stocks and Wait a Decade.
